_sources: aoecompanion.com community guides (Red Phosphorus Uncounterable FC, civ-specific)
_note: Villager counts and steps follow AoE Companion's published build guides. Red Phosphorus's signature build is the Uncounterable Fast Castle, which flexes into Knights / Crossbows / Monks+Mangonel / Unique Unit in Castle Age.

builds.name: Scout Rush
builds.summary: Cheap Feudal aggression with Scout Cavalry. No gold-heavy units; harass economy and deny boar/deer.
dark: Vil 7: build Lumber Camp then wood
Research Loom, click Feudal at ~20 vils
notes: Best on open maps. Snipe villagers, deny boar/deer.
Transition into Archers, Skirmishers or a boom.

builds.name: Archer Rush (Fast Archers)
builds.summary: Feudal Archers from two ranges. Strong, flexible opener for archer civs.
dark: Research Loom, click Feudal at ~21 vils
feudal: Shift sheep -> farms as food depletes, keep gold
notes: Great with bonus-archer civs (Britons, Mayans, Ethiopians, Vietnamese).
Add a 3rd range or transition to Crossbows in Castle.

builds.name: Men-at-Arms → Archers
builds.summary: Early Militia pressure that upgrades to Men-at-Arms, then transitions into Archers.
dark: Research Loom, click Feudal at vil 21
notes: Militia harass while archers come online.
Punishes greedy Fast Castles.

builds.name: Men-at-Arms + Tower Rush
builds.summary: Aggressive forward push: Militia plus forward Towers to siege the enemy economy.
feudal: Send villagers forward to enemy base
Build forward Towers near their resources
notes: High risk/high reward; commit fully.
Strong with Incas, Koreans, Japanese, Teutons towers.

builds.name: Drush → Archers
builds.summary: Dark Age Militia rush to disrupt the enemy, then a strong Archer follow-up.
dark: Build Barracks, train 3 Militia, send to opponent
notes: Militia delay the enemy while your eco stays intact.
Lure 2nd boar during Dark Age.

builds.name: Drush → Fast Castle
builds.summary: Militia harass in Dark Age, then Fast Castle behind it and hit Castle with Crossbows.
dark: Build Barracks, make 3 Militia, send to opponent
notes: Militia buy time for the Fast Castle.
Flexible vs many openings.

builds.name: Fast Castle → Knights
builds.summary: Standard Fast Castle into Knight production from two stables. Bread-and-butter for cavalry civs.
dark: Vils 24-27: Gold Camp + gold; click Feudal at vil 27
feudal: Vils 28-29: gold; click Castle at vil 29
notes: Franks, Berbers, Lithuanians, Magyars love this.
Add a Siege Workshop / monks vs counters.

builds.name: Fast Castle → Boom
builds.summary: Greedy economic Fast Castle: drop 2-3 extra Town Centers for a huge villager count.
feudal: Blacksmith (1 from wood), Market (2 from wood)
castle: Build 2 new Town Centers (4 vils each from woodlines)
notes: Safe maps / pocket position. Defend, then crush with superior eco.
Needs walls and map control.

builds.name: Fast Castle → Unique Unit
builds.summary: Fast Castle that drops a Castle and powers straight into the civ's unique unit.
dark: Vil 24: Gold Camp; Vil 26: Stone Camp
castle: Take 5-7 vils to build a Castle
Train unique units when Castle completes
notes: Great when the unique unit is strong in Castle Age (Longbow, Mangudai, Conq, etc.).
Hold ground until the Castle lands.

builds.name: Uncounterable FC → Knights
builds.author: Red Phosphorus
builds.summary: Red Phosphorus's safe FC opening into Knight production. Default vs archers/infantry on open maps.
dark: Vil 8: Lumber Camp; Vil 9: 2 houses + palisade (max 5 tiles)
Vils 10-16: food under TC; lure 2nd boar ~vil 11
Vil 17: Mill on berries, +4 to berries
Vil 19: Mining Camp on stone, +2 to stone
feudal: If pressured: don't make villagers; sell stone/wood and click up
Vs enemy FC: sell 300 stone + 100 wood, buy 100 food, click up
builds.when: Open maps vs archers/infantry; cavalry civs (Franks, Berbers, Lithuanians, Magyars).
notes: Keep 6+ on a dead boar, 3+ on a dead deer; watch food decay.
Same opening every game — you choose the follow-up by what the enemy builds. That flexibility is the 'uncounterable' part.

builds.name: Uncounterable FC → Crossbows
builds.author: Red Phosphorus
builds.summary: Same FC opening into massed Crossbows. Strong vs infantry and light cavalry; great for archer civs.
dark: Vil 8: Lumber Camp; Vil 9: 2 houses + palisade (max 5 tiles)
Vils 10-16: food under TC; lure 2nd boar ~vil 11
Vil 17: Mill on berries, +4 to berries
Vil 19: Mining Camp on stone, +2 to stone
feudal: If pressured: don't make villagers; sell stone/wood and click up
Vs enemy FC: sell 300 stone + 100 wood, buy 100 food, click up
castle: Mass Crossbows; research Fletching + Bodkin Arrow
builds.when: Vs infantry or light cavalry; archer civs (Britons, Mayans, Ethiopians, Vietnamese).
notes: Keep 6+ on a dead boar, 3+ on a dead deer; watch food decay.
Same opening every game — you choose the follow-up by what the enemy builds.

builds.name: Uncounterable FC → Monks + Mangonel
builds.author: Red Phosphorus
builds.summary: Same FC opening into a Monk + Mangonel composition. Answers massed archers and unique-unit pushes.
dark: Vil 8: Lumber Camp; Vil 9: 2 houses + palisade (max 5 tiles)
Vils 10-16: food under TC; lure 2nd boar ~vil 11
Vil 17: Mill on berries, +4 to berries
Vil 19: Mining Camp on stone, +2 to stone
feudal: If pressured: don't make villagers; sell stone/wood and click up
Vs enemy FC: sell 300 stone + 100 wood, buy 100 food, click up
castle: Screen with a few Knights or Spearmen
builds.when: Vs massed archers or strong unique-unit pushes; civs with good Monks/Siege.
notes: Keep 6+ on a dead boar, 3+ on a dead deer; watch food decay.
Same opening every game — you choose the follow-up by what the enemy builds.

builds.name: Uncounterable FC → Unique Unit
builds.author: Red Phosphorus
builds.summary: Same FC opening, then drop a Castle and pump the civ's unique unit.
dark: Vil 8: Lumber Camp; Vil 9: 2 houses + palisade (max 5 tiles)
Vils 10-16: food under TC; lure 2nd boar ~vil 11
Vil 17: Mill on berries, +4 to berries
Vil 19: Mining Camp on stone, mine extra stone for a Castle
feudal: If pressured: don't make villagers; sell stone/wood and click up
castle: Take 5-7 villagers to build a Castle
Pump the unique unit when the Castle lands
builds.when: Civ with a strong Castle-age unique unit (Longbowman, Mangudai, Conquistador, Cataphract).
notes: Keep 6+ on a dead boar, 3+ on a dead deer; watch food decay.
Needs extra stone in Dark Age for the Castle.

builds.name: Uncounterable FC → Boom (2-3 TC)
builds.author: Red Phosphorus
builds.summary: Same FC opening into a greedy economic boom. Use when you're safe and hold map control.
dark: Vil 8: Lumber Camp; Vil 9: 2 houses + palisade (max 5 tiles)
Vils 10-16: food under TC; lure 2nd boar ~vil 11
Vil 17: Mill on berries, +4 to berries
Vil 19: Mining Camp on stone, +2 to stone
feudal: Wall up and secure your map control
castle: Expand farms; add a Blacksmith line
Transition to a bigger army once the eco snowballs
builds.when: Pocket / walled positions where you're safe; convert a lead into eco.
notes: Keep 6+ on a dead boar, 3+ on a dead deer; watch food decay.
Requires good walls and map control to be safe.

builds.name: Uncounterable FC → Eagles
builds.author: Red Phosphorus
builds.summary: Same FC opening into Eagle Warriors. The cavalry-free answer for Meso civs.
dark: Vil 8: Lumber Camp; Vil 9: 2 houses + palisade (max 5 tiles)
Vils 10-16: food under TC; lure 2nd boar ~vil 11
Vil 17: Mill on berries, +4 to berries
Vil 19: Mining Camp on stone, +2 to stone
feudal: If pressured: don't make villagers; sell stone/wood and click up
castle: Mass Eagle Warriors; add upgrades + Blacksmith armor
Mix in Skirmishers / Pikes as needed
builds.when: Meso civs without Stables (Aztecs, Maya, Incas).
notes: Keep 6+ on a dead boar, 3+ on a dead deer; watch food decay.
Eagles raid economy well; use their speed to snipe ranged units and villagers.

builds.name: Fast Imperial
builds.vills: 30 to Feudal, 32 to Castle, ~34 to Imperial
builds.summary: Rush straight to Imperial Age for powerful unit/tech spikes (Paladins, Arbalests, siege, gunpowder).
imperial: Shift villagers to farms as berries deplete
Power-spike with your best Imperial composition
notes: Pocket / defended position; needs walls.
Civs with eco bonuses (Vikings, Mayans, Chinese) reach it faster.

builds.name: Portuguese Fast Imperial → Organ/Monk/Treb
builds.summary: Portuguese fast imperial pushing Organ Guns with Trebuchets and Monks; Feitorias sustain the late game.
dark: Push 3 deer minimum in Dark Age
castle: Build castle (4 from stone, return to stone)
imperial: Organ Guns push, Trebs break castles, Monks vs Mangonels
notes: Feitorias replace dying eco in the very late game.
Organ Gun + Treb + Monk is hard to crack.

builds.name: Frank Fast Forward Castle Drop
builds.summary: Aggressive Frankish forward Castle around 13-14 minutes, then Knights from the front.
castle: Wood vils -> farms as berries finish
notes: Franks: free farm upgrades + cheap castles make this strong.
Scout relocates huntable animals under the TC for fast food.

builds.name: Bohemian Hussite Wagon Rush
builds.summary: Bohemian Castle-Age timing with Hussite Wagons from two (often forward) castles.
castle: Defensive Castle (4 from stone), then forward Castle (6 from stone)
Queue Hussite Wagons from both Castles
notes: Hussite Wagons soak projectiles for your gunpowder/army.
Bohemians' Blacksmith/University discounts fund the push.
